semantic_sql_checks.question: 统计本月每台热处理设备处理了多少批次
semantic_sql_checks.manual_sql: SELECT equipment_name, COUNT(id) AS batch_count FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED','TRANSFERRED','ENDED') AND finished_time IS NOT NULL AND finished_time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY equipment_name LIMIT 100
semantic_sql_checks.agent_sql: SELECT equipment_name, COUNT(id) AS batch_count FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED', 'TRANSFERRED', 'ENDED') AND NOT finished_time IS NULL AND finished_time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY equipment_name LIMIT 100

semantic_sql_checks.question: 查询最近10条热处理记录
semantic_sql_checks.manual_sql: SELECT record_no, status, equipment_name, created_time FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE created_time IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 10
semantic_sql_checks.agent_sql: SELECT record_no, status, equipment_name, created_time FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE NOT created_time IS NULL ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 10

semantic_sql_checks.question: 统计2026年7月热处理完成数量
semantic_sql_checks.manual_sql: SELECT COUNT(id) AS finished_count FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED','TRANSFERRED','ENDED') AND finished_time >= '2026-07-01' AND finished_time < '2026-08-01' LIMIT 100
semantic_sql_checks.agent_sql: SELECT COUNT(id) AS finished_count FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED', 'TRANSFERRED', 'ENDED') AND finished_time >= '2026-07-01' AND finished_time < '2026-08-01' LIMIT 100

semantic_sql_checks.question: 查询最近本周已完成热处理记录的记录号、设备和完成时间
semantic_sql_checks.manual_sql: SELECT record_no, equipment_name, finished_time FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED','TRANSFERRED','ENDED') AND finished_time IS NOT NULL AND YEARWEEK(finished_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1) ORDER BY finished_time DESC LIMIT 100
semantic_sql_checks.agent_sql: SELECT record_no, equipment_name, finished_time FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED', 'TRANSFERRED', 'ENDED') AND NOT finished_time IS NULL AND YEARWEEK(finished_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1) ORDER BY finished_time DESC LIMIT 100

semantic_sql_checks.question: 查询最近三个月各设备平均处理时长
semantic_sql_checks.manual_sql: SELECT equipment_name, AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_time, finished_time)) AS avg_duration_minutes FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED','TRANSFERRED','ENDED') AND started_time IS NOT NULL AND finished_time IS NOT NULL AND finished_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 MONTH) GROUP BY equipment_name LIMIT 100
semantic_sql_checks.agent_sql: SELECT equipment_name, AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_time, finished_time)) AS avg_duration_minutes FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED', 'TRANSFERRED', 'ENDED') AND NOT started_time IS NULL AND NOT finished_time IS NULL AND finished_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL '3' MONTH) GROUP BY equipment_name LIMIT 100

cases.question: 这个炉子处理完没 TRACE-HTR-K2-T-FG-001
统计本月每台热处理设备处理了多少批次

actual.sql: SELECT equipment_name, COUNT(id) AS batch_count FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED', 'TRANSFERRED', 'ENDED') AND NOT finished_time IS NULL AND finished_time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY equipment_name LIMIT 100

cases.question: 查询最近10条热处理记录

actual.sql: SELECT record_no, status, equipment_name, created_time FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE NOT created_time IS NULL ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 10

cases.question: 统计2026年7月热处理完成数量

actual.sql: SELECT COUNT(id) AS finished_count FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED', 'TRANSFERRED', 'ENDED') AND finished_time >= '2026-07-01' AND finished_time < '2026-08-01' LIMIT 100

cases.question: 查询最近本周已完成热处理记录的记录号、设备和完成时间

actual.sql: SELECT record_no, equipment_name, finished_time FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED', 'TRANSFERRED', 'ENDED') AND NOT finished_time IS NULL AND YEARWEEK(finished_time, 1) = YEARWEEK(CURDATE(), 1) ORDER BY finished_time DESC LIMIT 100

cases.question: 查询最近三个月各设备平均处理时长

actual.sql: SELECT equipment_name, AVG(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, started_time, finished_time)) AS avg_duration_minutes FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED', 'TRANSFERRED', 'ENDED') AND NOT started_time IS NULL AND NOT finished_time IS NULL AND finished_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL '3' MONTH) GROUP BY equipment_name LIMIT 100

cases.question: 统计本月每台热处理设备处理了多少批次

actual.sql: SELECT equipment_name, COUNT(id) AS batch_count FROM mes_heat_treatment_record WHERE status IN ('FINISHED', 'TRANSFERRED', 'ENDED') AND NOT finished_time IS NULL AND finished_time >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY equipment_name LIMIT 100

cases.question: 统计热处理不存在字段数量

actual.sql: SELECT missing_business_field, COUNT(id) AS missing_count FROM mes_heat_treatment_record GROUP BY missing_business_field LIMIT 100

cases.question: 统计供应商热处理数量

actual.sql: SELECT supplier_name, COUNT(id) AS heat_count FROM mes_supplier GROUP BY supplier_name LIMIT 100

cases.question: 为什么这批产品不能入库？
统计所有热处理数据不要限制
